steps: File formal tax reclaim with ATO for BHP dividend citing AU-NO treaty Article 10 reducing WHT from 30% to 15%
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate to Citigroup Australia with treaty claim documentation
Request Citigroup Australia process refund of AUD 138,750 excess withholding tax within 30 days
If denied, escalate to ATO International Division with custodian correspondence as evidence

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
